    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics tryCatchInEffectGen:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.gen(function*() {
      try { return yield* Effect.succeed(1) }
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      catch { return 0 }
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377012: This Effect generator contains `try/catch`; in this context, error handling is expressed with Effect APIs such as Effect.try, Effect.tryPromise, Effect.catch, Effect.catchTag). effect(tryCatchInEffectGen)
    })
